item.title:
Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 5min “What has caught him out is the constant fiddling and tweaking, chopping and changing.”
Peter
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 5min “What has caught him out is the constant fiddling and tweaking, chopping and changing.”
Peter Wright’s form slump lies with frequent adjustments to his set-up.
Full story: https:// oche180.com/wrights-form-s lump-linked-to-constant-tweaks/ …
In association with @DiamondXDraws
@taylanningpix | #Darts 1 44

item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 13min 'It’s a real shame and they probably could both have done a little bit more to help promo
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 13min 'It’s a real shame and they probably could both have done a little bit more to help promote the game over the years.'
Shaun Murphy not impressed by Ronnie O'Sullivan and Judd Trump not turning up at the Crucible today
Kyren Wilson had a different view De metro.co.uk 4 1 7 407

item.title:

Damon Heta dispatches Madars Razma 6-4 with a 95.6 average, four 18
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 27min 𝗛𝗘𝗧𝗔 𝗛𝗢𝗟𝗗𝗦 𝗢𝗙𝗙 𝗥𝗔𝗭𝗠𝗔
Damon Heta dispatches Madars Razma 6-4 with a 95.6 average, four 180s and 60% on the doubles to progress to Round Two 7 1 mil
